generated_body:
The sommelier at Agli Amici Rovinj is heading our way, and I am already smiling. 🍷

This is the only two-Michelin-star restaurant in all of Croatia, and every detail here feels intentional and alive.

Grissini stand upright in a sleek black cylinder, a cracker rests in a ceramic snail holder, and a glass of white wine catches the light — this is how a meal begins here.

Our sommelier has an almost telepathic sense for what we want, and honestly, we are laughing more than I expected at a fine dining table.

Agli Amici Rovinj is the Istrian outpost of the Scarello family from Udine, and Michela Scarello herself is here today — on her vacation, no less.
title: Agli Amici Rovinj Gourmet Sommelier
